svg.text: level gate → fan-out to ALL appenders

g.text: one log() passes the level gate,

svg.text: all final · thread captured at log time (async-safe)
LoggingService (backend query API) is shown in the store band below ↓
new destination = new class — LoggerImpl never changes (Open/Closed)
FormattedAppender / SamplingAppender wrap a sink (Decorator) to add format or 1-in-N sampling
Console · File · Kafka · Elasticsearch all implement LogAppender; JsonFormatter · PatternFormatter implement LogFormatter
lock-free O(1) ingest · never blocks producers
reads are O(n) stream scans over the queue — add an inverted index (Elasticsearch/Lucene) for O(1) keyword search in prod
Kafka / ES appenders forward → central store (LoggingService.log)
① services → LoggerImpl (level gate) → ② immutable LogEntry + LogLevel → ③ interface seams → ④ appender/formatter strategies (fan-out) → ⑤ centralized bounded store + query API

g.text: Patterns: Strategy · Observer · Chain · Singleton · Decorator
